Assent Inc. recognizes winners of Assent Achieve awards at their global conference, Evolve, for leading supply chain sustainability programs.
news.summary: Assent Inc. (Assent), a prominent company specializing in supply chain sustainability management, has revealed the recipients of the first-ever Assent Achieve awards during its annual global conference, Evolve, which took place on October 9-10 in Nashville, Tennessee. This customer awards program acknowledges manufacturing firms and individuals who exhibit exceptional performance in areas such as product compliance, ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance), and supply chain sustainability management. The Assent Achieve winners were chosen from a pool of participants exceeding 100.

news.headline: Utility Inc. unveils new public safety solutions at IACP 2024, to showcase at Boston conference on Oct 19-22.
news.summary: Utility, Inc. is set to present its newest advancements at the upcoming International Association of Chiefs of Police (IACP) conference in Boston from October 19 to 22.

news.headline: Sasol Limited's AGM on November 15, 2024, will be held electronically at 09:00 via their online platform.
news.summary: Sasol has announced that its Annual General Meeting (AGM) is scheduled to take place on Friday, November 15, 2024, at 09:00 through Sasol's electronic meeting platform. The meeting will address the matters outlined in the AGM notice.

Two builders control 88% of Ethereum blocks in Oct, sparking centralization worries despite network's architecture.
news.summary: Several analysts are not viewing this as a centralization worry because of the underlying builder-proposer architecture of the Ethereum network.

news.headline: Kraken debuts Wrapped Bitcoin token kBTC, strengthens BTC's standing as crypto hub, encourages innovative usage.
news.summary: Kraken reports that the introduction of kBTC further solidifies Bitcoin's standing as the hub of the cryptocurrency market. This new development also provides developers with opportunities to innovate and discover novel applications for BTC.

news.headline: XRP price surges today on speculation that SEC may miss deadline in Ripple lawsuit, lifting price significantly.
news.summary: The price of XRP has increased today amidst speculation that the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) might fail to meet a crucial court filing deadline in the ongoing Ripple lawsuit.

news.headline: Virginia National Bankshares Corp. reports Q3 earnings of $4.6 million, with $0.85 per share, slightly down from last year.
news.summary: In Charlottesville, Virginia, on October 17, 2024, Virginia National Bankshares Corporation (NASDAQ: VABK) disclosed that their quarterly net income was $4.6 million, equivalent to $0.85 per diluted share, for the quarter concluding on September 30, 2024. This amount displayed a slight decrease from the previous quarter's $4.7 million, or $0.86 per share.

news.headline: Oakbridge Insurance partners with Hull & Associates, a Tuscaloosa-based agency. Expands reach as top insurance firm in US.
news.summary: In Tuscaloosa, Alabama on October 17, 2024, Oakbridge Insurance Agency LLC revealed a significant collaboration with Hull & Associates, a prominent insurance and risk management firm. Oakbridge, a leading agency in the U.S., solidified this partnership with Hull & Associates, based out of Tuscaloosa. It marks a significant step forward for both entities in their respective fields.

news.headline: Agiloft named Leader by Gartner in Contract Life Cycle Management for 5 years, known for execution and vision.
news.summary: Agiloft, a company based in REDWOOD CITY, California, has recently been acknowledged for its exceptional execution and comprehensive vision in the field of data-first contract lifecycle management (CLM). The announcement was made on October 17, 2024. The company has been recognized as a Leader in the Gartner Magic Quadrant for Contract Life Cycle, highlighting its strong performance and innovative approach in this sector. This accolade showcases Agiloft's prominent position in the industry and its dedication to excellence.

news.headline: Marriott Bonvoy Resorts in Caribbean offer wellness activities to rejuvenate guests. Fla., Oct. 17, 2024 /PRNewswire.
news.summary: Explore harmony for both body and mind in the Caribbean through engaging in various outdoor activities offered at Marriott International properties. These activities are aimed at promoting wellness and revitalizing the soul. Visitors can participate in a range of options to achieve physical and mental equilibrium. Feel recharged and at peace while enjoying the lush Caribbean landscapes. The initiative encompasses activities rooted in enhancing well-being. Engage in these activities at Marriott International properties spread across the Caribbean region where relaxation and rejuvenation await.

Cancer Check Labs partners with Healthcode Medical to expand into Canada, boosting early cancer detection services.
news.summary: An announcement was made on Oct. 17, 2024, that Cancer Check Labs will be entering the Canadian market through a partnership with Healthcode Medical. This move is intended to improve early cancer detection services in Canada. Cancer Check Labs is known for its expertise in this field, while Healthcode Medical is a prominent player in innovative healthcare solutions. The collaboration between the two companies is expected to bring significant advancements in cancer detection across Canada. This marks a new chapter for Cancer Check Labs as they expand their reach beyond the U.S. and into the Canadian market, leveraging Healthcode Medical's established presence in the healthcare industry.

news.headline: NPA backs Alabama HB 58, penalizing failure to disclose concealed firearm to officer, enhancing safety.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, in Indianapolis, the National Police Association (NPA) announced their endorsement of Alabama House Bill 58. This bill mandates individuals to disclose possession of a concealed firearm to law enforcement when questioned. Failure to comply will result in penalties. Introduced by Alabama lawmakers, this bill aims to enhance transparency and safety during law enforcement interactions.

news.headline: AdelFi Credit Union partners with Teach Them Diligently to offer financial services to homeschool families nationwide.
news.summary: In Brea, California, as of October 17, 2024, AdelFi Credit Union has announced a new collaboration with Teach Them Diligently, a prominent organization supporting Gospel-centered homeschooling families nationwide. This partnership will establish AdelFi as the preferred financial institution for...

news.headline: ECB's President Lagarde: Recent surveys point to gradual recovery in household spending.
ECB's President Lagarde: Surveys suggest slowing employment growth.
ECB's President Lagarde: We expect the economy to strengthen over time.
September retail sales beat estimates: up 0.4% from August, surpassing 0.3% consensus. Jobless claims fell more than expected.
news.summary: In September, retail sales performed better than expected, showing a 0.4% increase from the previous month, surpassing the economist consensus of 0.3% and August's 0.1% growth. However, the year-over-year retail sales slowed down to 1.7% from August's 2.2%. Excluding motor vehicles and parts, retail sales grew by 0.5% month-over-month. This positive retail sales data points towards strong consumer spending and signals broader economic growth. In contrast, the latest labor market data revealed an increase in jobless claims for the week ending Oct. 12, indicating potential challenges in the job market.

ECB's President Lagarde: Households consumed less than expected.

Sust introduces ChargeBot, innovative mobile charging for landscapers; game-changer in electric equipment charging.
news.summary: In Montgomery County, Maryland, on October 17, 2024, Sust, a prominent company specializing in sustainable lawn care and electrification, has unveiled the debut of ChargeBot. This groundbreaking mobile charging innovation caters specifically to the requirements of landscapers and outdoor workers nationwide.

news.headline: Silverbelly Whiskey introduces annual $99 "Birthday Whiskey" in honor of Alan Jackson's 66th birthday.
news.summary: Today in Nashville, Tennessee, Silverbelly Whiskey has revealed the debut of their special edition Silverbelly "Birthday Whiskey" to celebrate the 66th birthday of a renowned musician. Priced at $99, this newest product boasts a 6.6-year-old age statement.

news.headline: Alliance Consolidated Group buys Arlington Medical Property in Dallas-Fort Worth metro, aimed at investor growth and service expansion.
news.summary: The acquisition of a significant medical facility will be instrumental in fueling investor expansion and enhancing healthcare offerings in the Dallas-Fort Worth region. On October 17, 2024, Alliance Consolidated Group of Companies, a prominent player in commercial real estate investment based in Chicago, announced this strategic move. This purchase reflects a significant investment in the area's healthcare sector, highlighting the growing importance of the region. This development signals a positive outlook for both investors and healthcare services in the metro area, emphasizing the continued growth potential in this market.

news.headline: SCOPE Health Inc. acquires EYETAMINS supplements, a leading eye health supplements provider by Dr. Kaushal Kulkarni.
news.summary: SCOPE Health Inc. has recently acquired EYETAMINS, a prominent company specializing in eye health supplements. Founded by Dr. Kaushal Kulkarni, a board-certified neuro-ophthalmologist, EYETAMINS provides a variety of cutting-edge products tailored for eye care. This acquisition marks a significant development in the industry and showcases SCOPE Health Inc.'s commitment to expanding its portfolio.

news.headline: Scrum Alliance launches 3 AI courses to upskill professionals, enhance agility. DENVER Oct. 17, 2024 /PRNewswire.
news.summary: In Denver on October 17, 2024, the professional credentialing leader, Scrum Alliance, introduced a new range of on-demand AI courses aimed at future-proofing careers and improving organizational flexibility. The courses are tailored to enhance skills and agility, reflecting the organization's commitment to adaptability in the rapidly changing job market.

news.headline: RedStone Logistics ranks 38th on Kansas City Fast 50 list for 2024, noted for supply chain optimization services.
news.summary: RedStone Logistics, based in Olathe, Kansas, recently revealed their selection in the 2024 Kansas City Fast 50 list for being one of the fastest-growing companies. The company, known for offering supply chain optimization and third-party logistics services, has gained recognition for its rapid growth. This acknowledgment highlights RedStone Logistics' success and advancement in the industry.

news.headline: Global RTD cocktail market valued at $1.01 billion in 2023, expected to reach $2.23 billion by 2029 with a CAGR of 14.16%.
news.summary: In Dublin, a recent report on the Global RTD Cocktail Market has been made available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. This market, segmented by Type, Flavor Type (Flavored and Unflavored), Packaging (Bottles, Cans, and Others), Distribution Channel, and Region, was valued at US$1.01 billion in 2023. Forecasts suggest that the market is anticipated to expand significantly, reaching a value of US$2.23 billion by 2029. This growth represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of approximately 14.16% over the forecast period.

Travelers Companies (NYSE:TRV) reports Q3 revenue growth at 12% to $11.904B, net written premiums rose 8% to $11.3B. Core income per share jumped 169% to $5.24, beating estimate of $3.64.
news.summary: Shares of The Travelers Companies (NYSE: TRV) are up in premarket trading as the company announced a 12% year-over-year increase in third-quarter revenue to $11.904 billion, surpassing the expected $11.491 billion. Core income per share also saw a significant surge of 169% to $5.24, higher than the $3.64 consensus estimate. This impressive core income growth was driven by improved underwriting gains, favorable reserve development, and increased net investment income, partially offset by heightened catastrophe losses. Net written premiums for the third quarter rose by 8% to $11.3 billion. In the Business Insurance segment, net written premiums climbed 9% to $5.5 billion, with renewal premiums up 10.5% and a retention rate of 86%. Bond & Specialty Insurance premiums grew by 7% to over $1.1 billion, showcasing a 90% retention in management liability and a 7% increase in...

news.headline: Global thermal energy storage market valued at $5.88B in 2023, expected to reach $12.10B by 2031 with a CAGR of 9.45%.
news.summary: The global thermal energy storage market was valued at $5.88 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach $12.10 billion by 2031, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 9.45% from 2024 to 2031. The market is expanding due to the increasing preference for renewable energy sources, particularly concentrated solar power, and the growing demand for thermal energy storage systems in HVAC. Factors such as the need for enhanced energy efficiency, increased electricity demand during peak hours, and government support for renewable energy technologies are driving this growth. The market report covers 197 pages, with 95 tables and 76 figures, providing a comprehensive overview of the thermal energy storage market.

news.headline: Fairview EDC opens Revolving Kitchen Fairview, a culinary incubator, on Oct. 17, 2024, to inspire local entrepreneurs.
news.summary: A dynamic food hall and culinary incubator named Revolving Kitchen Fairview is set to inspire local entrepreneurs and food lovers in Fairview, Texas. The Fairview Economic Development Corporation has announced the Grand Opening of this innovative space on Oct. 17, 2024. The purpose of the culinary incubator is to support and nurture aspiring food entrepreneurs in the area, providing them with a platform to showcase their talents and creations. This initiative aims to boost the local food industry and economy, catering to the growing demand for unique culinary experiences.

news.headline: Input 1 and BindHQ partner to revolutionize MGA operations with automation and efficiency. Announced on Oct. 17, 2024 in Westlake Village, California.
news.summary: In Westlake Village, California on October 17, 2024, the top digital billing and payment solutions provider for the insurance sector, Input 1, has teamed up with BindHQ, the comprehensive MGA management platform provider. This strategic partnership aims to revolutionize the insurance industry.

Finnish authority approved transfer of Secto Automotive's used car business to Kamux. Showrooms involved in the transfer.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, in Espoo, Finland, the Finnish Competition and Consumer Authority has given the green light for Kamux Corporation to take over Secto Automotive's used car business. This includes the showrooms located in Friisilä, Espoo, and Petikko, Vantaa. This approval marks a significant development in the automotive industry and solidifies Kamux's presence in the market. Stay tuned for further updates on this exciting transition.

news.headline: DCN Dx will showcase Lateral Flow Development Services and miniDxR at MEDICA 2024 with contract IVD services and reader.
news.summary: DCN Dx will be showcasing their contract in vitro diagnostic (IVD) services and customizable lateral flow reader at Booth Hall 3 / D25-2 in CARLSBAD, Calif., starting on October 17, 2024. This event marks their position as a top player in the industry for contract lateral flow assay (LFA) IVD development and manufacturing. Attendees can learn more about their advanced services and products for diagnostic clinical purposes.
